lesson: Cell-less fill moving with the harmony produced parallel fifths at the cantus change (beats 3.5-4). Recomposed so every dissonance sits inside a named cell - passing at 0.5 and 2.5, escape at 3.5, neighbor at 4.5, enclosure into the final - and the parallels disappeared with the fill: directional identity is what keeps florid tones from doubling the other voice.
